title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at FabAlley South Asia Partners - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
FabAlley South Asia Partners invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Digital Marketing Manager at our Navi Mumbai location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About FabAlley South Asia Partners:
FabAlley South Asia Partners is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Develop and implement category growth strategies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FabAlley South Asia Partners!
